support_boundary: tt-supabase issues are NOT covered under tt-core support SLA

integration_points.direction: tt-supabase joins tt_shared_net for tunnel exposure
integration_points.note: Only needed if you want Supabase accessible via Cloudflare Tunnel

integration_points.rule: tt-supabase uses its own PostgreSQL instance — NEVER the tt-core postgres
tt-supabase secrets are in tt-supabase/secrets/ — NEVER in tt-core secrets
